description: Unified semantic-addresses tracker binding three sources: main capture registry (observed events), Revelation First reception registry (thesis-specific observed events), and the archive term index (subjunctive — catalogued but not yet observed). Three observation classes: observed_address (positive), verified_non_address (negative), subjunctive (not yet checked).

sources.mm-rf-reception: data/trackers/mm-revfirst-registry.json — Revelation First Reception Registry v2.4, 71 observations
sources.mm-termindex: data/trackers/mm-termindex.json — Archive term index v0.2, 1,400 catalogued terms
sources.mm-rf-battery: data/trackers/rf-tracker-page.html — Revelation First 100-query battery in 12 categories
sources.mm-mint: data/trackers/mm-mint.json — Sémantique Potentielle, 85 minted families across 4 releases (canonical + variants + forensic canaries)
sources.cha-workplan-870: Workplan deposit #870 claims (2026-06-22): addresses for newly-minted concepts

observation_classes.observed_address: Query has been observed at least once with a positive status (EXACT_MATCH, BROAD_MATCH, ADOPTION, WOUND_GAUGE, FAIR_TREATMENT, PARTIAL)
observation_classes.verified_non_address: Query has been observed at least once with a negative status (ZERO_RESULT, ZERO_INDEX, BASIN_MISS, DISSOLUTION, CORRECTION) AND has no positive observations
observation_classes.unrated: Query has observations but no decisive status (older captures pending rating)
observation_classes.subjunctive: Query catalogued from archive but never observed — hypothesized address pending test
